members.name: Scott Schindler
members.title: Aesop Academy Founder / CISO
members.bio: Healthcare CISO | Veteran | Entrepreneur | AI Educator leading global outreach to prepare the next generation for adapting to a changing world through AI literacy.
members.degree: AA - General Studies, 70+ IT / Security Certifications

members.name: Amir Habib
members.title: Managing Partner
members.bio:
Amir Habib is an executive leader in AI and digital strategy with a distinguished track record of driving large-scale transformation across some of the world's most complex enterprise environments — from Fortune 500 corporations to pioneering global technology firms. He brings deep expertise in intelligent automation, AI-enabled operations, and digital service delivery solutions to deliver measurable, lasting business outcomes.

He is especially passionate about harnessing AI to unlock efficiency at scale, elevate organizational decision-making, and build future-ready operating models.
members.degree: MIT - Executive Education in Digital Transformation / CTU - BSBA Finance and International Business / SMU - Lyle School of Engineering and Applied Science

members.name: Ervin Frenzel
members.credentials: Degrees: PHD (Cyberleadership), MISM, MSCSIA, BA Certs: CCISO, CISSP-ISSAP, CISSP-ISSMP, CCSP, SSCP, ECSA, ECEI (EC Council Certified Instructor), ISC2 OTP (ISC2 Certified Instructor )
members.title: CEO
members.bio: I designed/led multiple cyber programs across Texas and worked in many different cybersecurity and technical capacities over the past 36 years, GRC, bench technician, SOC tech and mgr, Security Manager, CISO, CEO, instructor, and consultant. As a multidisciplinary cyber practitioner, I hold ISC2 and EC Council cyber credentials, CompTIA and Microsoft technical component certs, and a MISM, MSCSISM, and  PhD.  I am the EC Council Academic instructor of the years (2020 + 2024), a NICE Ambassador.

members.name: Michael Madero
members.title: VP Information Security
members.bio: Michael is a senior Information Security executive with more than two decades of experience leading large scale identity, access, and security transformation across financial services, healthcare, and aviation. Known for elevating enterprise security posture while enabling business agility, Michael has built a reputation as a trusted advisor to senior leadership and a catalyst for modernization in complex, highly regulated environments.  As Vice President of Information Security at Mr. Cooper, Michael leads the enterprise Identity and Access Management program.

members.name: Richard Lightcap
members.credentials: PhD, EdD, CISSP, CSSLP, CISM, CISA, CEH
members.title: Dean of Information Technology
members.bio: Dr. Richard Lightcap is a cybersecurity leader, researcher, and educator specializing in AI-driven security operations, network security engineering, and enterprise risk governance. His work focuses on the intersection of artificial intelligence and cybersecurity, with an emphasis on workforce transformation, decision-making, and modern security architectures. He is the author of The AI-Driven CISO: Executive Strategies for Modern Cybersecurity Leadership, Leading in the Age of Intelligent Sysems, and contributes to advancing AI literacy and cybersecurity education.
members.degree: PhD in Cybersecurity Leadership, Capitol Technology University
